name: Cal.com AI Agents
summary: Public-surface review of Cal.com AI Agents

claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Cal.ai uses lifelike agents to book meetings, send reminders and follow up all through natural phone calls that boost conversions, reduce no-shows, and save time.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to 'Pricing' is available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: You can also see a live demo by our co-founder Peer by clicking the button below.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Free plan features, plus: Integrate with 100+ apps

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Cal.ai gives you full visibility into every AI-powered scheduling call so you can monitor, measure, and optimize performance across your workflows.
